source.title: Vanessa i Thompson nastupaju na humanitarnom koncertu

summary.title_hr: Vanessa i Thompson nastupaju na humanitarnom koncertu
summary.abstract_hr: Ovaj podcast donosi razgovor s Vanessom Mioč, izvođačicom duhovne glazbe, uoči humanitarnog koncerta "Hrvatska za Život" u Sisku. Koncert, na kojem će nastupiti i Marko Perković Thompson, ima za cilj prikupiti sredstva za pomoć trudnicama i majkama u potrebi. Vanessa dijeli svoja razmišljanja o važnosti obitelji i pro-life pokreta, te govori o osobnom duhovnom putovanju, utjecaju majke i sjećanjima na preminulog oca. Razgovor dotiče i teme duhovne glazbe, izazova u vezama te važnosti povjerenja u Boga.
key_points: Vanessa Mioč će nastupiti na humanitarnom koncertu "Hrvatska za Život" u Sisku, čiji je cilj prikupljanje sredstava za pomoć trudnicama i majkama u potrebi.
Ističe važnost obitelji kao najsvetije stvari i podržava pro-life apostolat, smatrajući ga iznimno potrebnim u današnjem vremenu.
Govori o utjecaju svoje majke na njezinu vjeru i o pjesmi "Imaš Oca" koja joj je posebno draga zbog osobnog iskustva gubitka oca u dobi od 12 godina.
Raspravlja se o strahu od odbijanja i visokim očekivanjima u vezama, te o važnosti otvorenosti i zajedničkog rada na duhovnom rastu, spominjući Ljetnu školu teologije tijela.
Naglašava važnost povjerenja u Boga i predavanja briga Njemu, citirajući psalam 139 i stih iz pjesme "neke težine nisu za te stvorene".
Duhovna glazba se razvija u Hrvatskoj, s rastućom sviješću o njezinoj važnosti i sve većim brojem organiziranih događaja.
Vanessa spominje sv. Josipa kao uzora muškarcima zbog njegove autentičnosti i vjere, te druge svece koji su joj pomagali u različitim životnim fazama.
summary.title_en: Vanessa and Thompson perform at a charity concert
summary.abstract_en: This podcast brings a conversation with Vanessa Mioč, a performer of spiritual music, on the eve of the humanitarian concert "Hrvatska za Život" in Sisak. The concert, at which Marko Perković Thompson will also perform, aims to collect funds to help pregnant women and mothers in need. Vanessa shares her thoughts on the importance of family and the pro-life movement, and speaks about her personal spiritual journey, the influence of her mother and memories of her deceased father. The conversation also touches upon topics of spiritual music, challenges in relationships and the importance of trust in God.
key_points_en: Vanessa Mioč will perform at the charity concert "Croatia for Life" in Sisak, whose goal is collecting funds for help to pregnant women and mothers in need.
He emphasizes the importance of family as the most sacred thing and supports the pro-life apostolate, considering it extremely necessary in today's time.
She speaks about the influence of her mother on her faith and about the song "You Have a Father" which is especially dear to her due to the personal experience of losing her father at the age of 12.

The fear of rejection and high expectations in relationships are discussed, as well as the importance of openness and joint work on spiritual growth, mentioning the Summer School of Theology of the Body.
Emphasizes the importance of trust in God and surrendering worries to Him, citing Psalm 139 and a verse from the song 'some burdens are not created for you'.
Spiritual music is developing in Croatia, with growing awareness of its importance and an increasing number of organized events.
Vanessa mentions Saint Joseph as a role model for men because of his authenticity and faith, and other saints who helped her in different life stages.
